ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species (e.g., Cabezon) */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "average_size" REAL /* Average size of the species */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species */,
  "reproduction_rate" REAL /* Reproduction rate of the species */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Last date the species data was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month (e.g., January) */,
  "month_number" INTEGER /* Month number (1-12) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the month */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the month */,
  "average_precipitation" REAL /* Average precipitation of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landings" (
  "landing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landing record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* ID of the month */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the landing */,
  "landings" INTEGER /* Number of fish landings */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the captain */,
  "landing_method" TEXT /* Method used for landing */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the landing */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landings_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landings_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES captains ("captain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landings_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landings_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user-role mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user-role mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role-permission mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role-permission mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fishing activity */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being fished */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the fishing activity */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel used */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the captain */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of fish caught */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the fishing activity */,
  "gear_type" TEXT /* Type of fishing gear used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_activities_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_activities_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES captains ("captain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_activities_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_activities_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  "depth" REAL /* Average depth of the location */,
  "water_temperature" REAL /* Average water temperature of the location */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Last date the location was surveyed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vessel */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vessel in tons */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of vessel */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the vessel was built */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Last date the vessel was inspected */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessels_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the owner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Last date the owner was contacted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "captains" (
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each captain */,
  "captain_name" TEXT /* Name of the captain */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the captain */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the captain */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Last date the captain received training */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("captain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the regulation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the regulation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the regulation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_regulations" (
  "activity_regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity-regulation mapping */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing activity */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relevant regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_regulations_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES regulations ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_regulations_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES fishing_activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_species" (
  "activity_species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity-species mapping */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing activity */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species caught */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the species caught */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_species_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_species_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES fishing_activities ("activity_id")
)
